emoji_usage_guidelines: Only use emojis when they add meaningful value to understanding
Acceptable uses: comparisons (→, vs), status indicators (✓, ✗), warnings (⚠)
Avoid in: section titles, subtitles, list items (unless indicating status)
Avoid excessive decorative emojis in general communication
response_style: Keep responses brief - user can see file changes in real-time
Avoid lengthy summaries of what was done at the end
Let tool outputs speak for themselves
Only explain when something is non-obvious or potentially surprising
Skip recap sections unless explicitly requested
For simple edits/tasks: just do the work without commentary
communication.plan_mode: always activate plan mode before making editions related to architecture decisions, implementing new features, and not small refactoring tasks

development.breaking_changes_reason: v1.0.0 is first stable release from v0.x.x beta

testing.custom_images_in_ci_reason: Avoid long build times (e.g., CDKTF timeout issues)

notes: This file stores global instructions and preferences for Claude Code sessions
Update this file when project conventions or preferences change
Reference docs/ folder for detailed project guidance
